name: Docker Sandboxes
description: OpenClaw sandbox backend for the Docker Sandboxes (sbx) CLI with bind-mounted workspaces and container command execution.

command.label: sbx Command
command.help: Path or command name for the Docker Sandboxes CLI (the standalone `sbx` binary, equivalently `docker sandbox`).

agent.label: Agent Template
agent.help: Docker Sandboxes agent used when creating a sandbox. Defaults to shell for a generic sandbox.

template.label: Container Image
template.help: Optional container image override passed as --template.

cpus.label: CPUs
cpus.help: Number of CPUs to allocate to the sandbox (0 = auto: all host CPUs).

memory.label: Memory
memory.help: Memory limit in binary units (for example 1024m or 8g).

user.label: Exec User
user.help: Username or UID used for command execution inside the sandbox (sbx exec -u).

clone.label: Clone Mode
clone.help: Run the agent on an in-container clone of the host Git repo instead of a bind mount. Host writes are not reflected until committed via the sandbox remote.

timeoutSeconds.label: Command Timeout Seconds
timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout for sbx CLI operations such as create, exec, and rm.
